name: Curried Eggs
recipeIngredient: 4 small hard-boiled eggs, shelled and warm
recipeInstructions:
1. Prick the eggs all over with a fork.
2. Melt butter in a small skillet.
3. Add the eggs to the melted butter.
4. Cook until light brown, rolling the eggs in butter constantly.
5. Sprinkle salt and spices over the eggs.
6. Shake the skillet to coat the eggs evenly.
7. Turn off the heat and transfer the eggs to a serving dish.
